query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `users` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` varchar(120) NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `password_hash` varchar(200),
  `phone` varchar(30),
  `cpf` varchar(20),
  `avatar_url` varchar(500),
  `address_zip` varchar(10),
  `address_street` varchar(200),
  `address_number` varchar(20),
  `address_complement` varchar(100),
  `address_neighborhood` varchar(100),
  `address_city` varchar(100),
  `address_state` varchar(2),
  `is_active` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `email_verified` tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `reset_token` varchar(200),
  `reset_token_expires_at` timestamp NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `last_login_at` timestamp NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `users_email_idx` (`email`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `roles` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `name` enum('admin','ops','creator_partner','customer','community_member') NOT NULL,
  `description` varchar(200),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `roles_name_unique` (`name`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_roles` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `role_id` int NOT NULL,
  `assigned_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `assigned_by` bigint,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_role_idx` (`user_id`, `role_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `user_roles_user_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `user_roles_role_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`role_id`) REFERENCES `roles` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `refresh_tokens` (
  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` bigint NOT NULL,
  `token` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `expires_at` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `revoked_at` timestamp NULL,
  `user_agent` varchar(500),
  `ip_address` varchar(50),
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `refresh_token_idx` (`token`),
  KEY `refresh_token_user_idx` (`user_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `refresh_tokens_user_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

INSERT IGNORE INTO `roles` (`name`, `description`) VALUES
  ('admin', 'Acesso total ao sistema'),
  ('ops', 'Gestão de pedidos e logística'),
  ('creator_partner', 'Parceiro criador de conteúdo'),
  ('customer', 'Cliente comum'),
  ('community_member', 'Membro da comunidade');

ALTER TABLE `orders` ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS `user_id` bigint NULL;

  `id` bigint NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,

);
